title: What Is Your Job Now, Farhan Thawar | Compile 26
summary: Farhan Thawar, head of engineering at Shopify, discusses how the engineer's role transforms when AI writes most code. Topics include shifts in the software development lifecycle, the movement of bottlenecks in development, and the distinction between prototyping and production deployment as AI capabilities increase.
writeup: Farhan Thawar, head of engineering at Shopify, examines how the engineering role shifts when AI writes most code. The talk covers changes to the software development lifecycle, where bottlenecks move once code generation is cheap, the learning challenges this creates, and how hiring strategies adapt. It separates prototyping from production work in an AI-assisted setting, framing the engineer's job around human-AI collaboration rather than manual code output.
